message:
ui: WASM-local Storage settings card + real IPFS gateway probe

Iteration 4. Implements the settings surface promised by ADR-006 §10
("Settings surface (new "Storage" tab on Connect screen)") and proves
the IPFS path end-to-end with a real public gateway round-trip.

ui/src/components/screens.jsx — `<StorageSettingsCard />`:
  - Embedding provider radio (None / OpenAI / Cohere / Voyage / Web-LLM).
    Conditional API-key field for the API providers — kept in JS memory
    only via React state, never persisted to IndexedDB. Cleared on tab
    reload by design (the welcome modal documents the trust boundary).
  - Cloud bundle storage radio (None / GCS / S3) with a bucket-prefix
    field. Settings persist; no fetch wired this iteration.
  - IPFS toggle + 4-mode segmented picker:
      off · HTTP gateway only · kubo RPC · kubo + gateway fallback
    Mirrors `ipfs-backend/`'s three production modes (ADR-005). Defaults
    to off so a fresh load doesn't 404 against a missing kubo daemon.
    Gateway URL field shows when 'gateway' or 'hybrid' selected; kubo
    URL field shows when 'kubo' or 'hybrid' selected. All persisted to
    IndexedDB.
  - Renderer toggles: WebGL (default on if `WebGL2RenderingContext`
    present) and Web Workers (default on if `typeof Worker !== 'undefined'`).
    Visible state only this iteration; the actual WebGL renderers and
    worker offload are next-iteration work.
  - Cache size cap slider (50–2000 MiB, default 200). Persisted; the
    LRU eviction integration with RuStore is also next-iteration work.
  - Bottom action: **Probe IPFS gateway** — an actual fetch to a known-
    good CID via the configured gateway, with audit row landing as
    `code=IPFS_OK | IPFS_HTTP_ERROR | IPFS_NETWORK_ERROR` per outcome.
    Live elapsed ms in toast + audit. Disabled when IPFS toggle is off.

ui/index.html — CSP relaxation:
  - The original `connect-src` allow-list (self + openai + loopback +
    npm registry) blocked the IPFS gateway synchronously (1ms refusals
    in the audit). WASM-local mode lets the user point at arbitrary
    HTTPS endpoints (gateway, cloud bucket, IdP), so connect-src now
    permits `https:` plus loopback (mcp-server, kubo). Tightening to a
    per-deployment allow-list is a v0.2 hardening item explicitly
    called out in the comment.

E2E validated this iteration:

  $ agent-browser ... Connect → toggle 'gateway only' → click 'Probe IPFS gateway'
    audit#9: { code: IPFS_OK, ms: 680, target: https://w3s.link,
               tool: rulake_ipfs_probe, outcome: ok }

  Real round-trip to a public IPFS gateway, fetching CID
  bafkreigh2akiscaildcqabsyg3dfr6chu3fgpregiymsck7e7aqa4s52zy
  ("Hello, World!" — pinned indefinitely on multiple gateways, used as
  reachability canary). Validates the full chain: React state →
  IndexedDB persist → CSP-permitted external fetch → audit row.

  Earlier failures (id=6 IPFS_NETWORK_ERROR ms=1, id=7 same) were CSP
  refusals — the audit row diagnostic correctly distinguishes synchronous
  policy refusal (1ms) from real network error (3+ seconds). Both code
  paths exercised, both observable in the Audit tail.

  agent-browser console --errors → 0 errors

Audit ledger after iteration 4 (9 rows):
  #1 rulake_verify       WITNESS_MATCH       22ms  (Bundle, wasm)
  #2 rulake_query        OK_VERIFIED          6ms  (Playground, wasm)
  #3 rulake_test         CONNECT_FAILED       1ms  (DNS-fail)
  #4 rulake_test         CONNECT_FAILED       1ms  (placeholder JWT)
  #5 rulake_test         INIT_OK             44ms  (live mcp-server)
  #6 rulake_ipfs_probe   IPFS_NETWORK_ERROR   1ms  (CSP-blocked, pre-fix)
  #7 rulake_ipfs_probe   IPFS_NETWORK_ERROR   1ms  (CSP-blocked, pre-fix)
  #8 rulake_ipfs_probe   IPFS_HTTP_ERROR   3032ms  (placeholder CID, 404)
  #9 rulake_ipfs_probe   IPFS_OK            680ms  (real CID, 200 OK)

Tri-mode status (per ADR-006 §10):
  Demo:        ✅ functional (commit 00ed0ca)
  WASM-local:  ✅ functional + IPFS gateway round-trip (this commit)
  Live (MCP):  ✅ functional (commit 5b956a9)

Co-Authored-By: claude-flow <ruv@ruv.net>

files.patch:
@@ -12,9 +12,14 @@
   <meta name="theme-color" content="#0a0e14" />
   <link rel="canonical" href="https://ruvnet.github.io/RuLake/" />
 
-  <!-- Defense-in-depth CSP. wasm-unsafe-eval needed for rulake-wasm. -->
+  <!-- Defense-in-depth CSP. wasm-unsafe-eval needed for rulake-wasm.
+       connect-src is intentionally permissive for the WASM-local mode
+       (ADR-006 §10): the user configures embedding/cloud/IPFS endpoints
+       at runtime. Tightening to a per-deployment allow-list is a v0.2
+       hardening item. https: covers cloud + IPFS gateways; http: covers
+       loopback dev (mcp-server, kubo). -->
   <meta http-equiv="Content-Security-Policy"
-        content="default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https://*.openai.com http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:* https://registry.npmjs.org; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'" />
+        content="default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' 'wasm-unsafe-eval'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self' https: http://localhost:* http://127.0.0.1:*; object-src 'none'; base-uri 'none'; form-action 'none'" />
 
   <!-- Open Graph -->
   <meta property="og:type" content="website" />

@@ -1211,6 +1211,215 @@ function AuditScreen({ envTab = 'prod' }) { } // ─── CONNECT SCREEN ───────────────────────────────────────────────── +// ─── STORAGE & RUNTIME SETTINGS (ADR-006 §10) ────────────────────── +// +// Backs the WASM-local mode promise: the toggles below configure how the +// in-browser substrate sources data and renders. Settings persist to +// IndexedDB via the existing kv store; embedding API keys are kept in JS +// memory only (never persisted). +function StorageSettingsCard() { + const [, kvOps] = (window.useRuStore || (() => [[], { put: () => {} }]))('kv'); + const [settings, setSettings] = React.useState({ + embedProvider: 'none', + cloudProvider: 'none', + cloudBucket: '', + ipfsEnabled: false, + ipfsMode: 'gateway', + ipfsGateway: 'https://w3s.link', + ipfsKuboUrl: 'http://127.0.0.1:5001', + webglEnabled: typeof WebGL2RenderingContext !== 'undefined', + workersEnabled: typeof Worker !== 'undefined', + cacheCapMib: 200, + }); + const [embedKeyInMemory, setEmbedKeyInMemory] = React.useState(''); + + // Load persisted settings on mount. + React.useEffect(() => { + if (!window.RuStore) return; + window.RuStore.list('kv').then(rows => { + const row = rows.find(r => r.label === 'storage-settings'); + if (row && row.settings) setSettings(s => ({ ...s, ...row.settings })); + }).catch(() => {}); + }, []); + + const update = (patch) => { + setSettings(prev => { + const next = { ...prev, ...patch }; + if (window.RuStore) { + window.RuStore.put('kv', { label: 'storage-settings', settings: next }); + } + return next; + }); + }; + + const dot = (v, color) => ( + + ); + + return ( +
+
+ ⚙ + Storage & runtime · WASM-local mode + ADR-006 §10 · IndexedDB +
+
+ + {settings.embedProvider !== 'none' && settings.embedProvider !== 'webllm' && ( + + )} + + + {settings.cloudProvider !== 'none' && ( + + )} + + + {settings.ipfsEnabled && (settings.ipfsMode === 'gateway' || settings.ipfsMode === 'hybrid') && ( + + )} + {settings.ipfsEnabled && (settings.ipfsMode === 'kubo' || settings.ipfsMode === 'hybrid') && ( + + )} + +
+ + Renderers + SVG fallback always present. + +

+ + + {settings.workersEnabled ? '○ workers' : '· workers off'} · + {settings.webglEnabled ? '○ webgl' : '· webgl off'} · + embed:{settings.embedProvider} · + ipfs:{settings.ipfsEnabled ? settings.ipfsMode : 'off'} + +

Capability matrix · once connected
